phases.label: Level 1
phases.why: Slight edge at level 1: your bubble-sleep pick bursts beat Anivia's wall-frost poke control on the margins. Take the short trades you start — just don't force a coin-flip all-in off a small lead.

phases.label: Level 2
phases.why: At level 2 the numbers lean your way — bubble-sleep pick bursts edge out the wall-frost poke control when both sides play it straight. Press the small advantages: wave position, first poke, cooldown ticks.

phases.label: Level 3
phases.why: Slight edge at level 3: your bubble-sleep pick bursts beat Anivia's wall-frost poke control on the margins. Take the short trades you start — just don't force a coin-flip all-in off a small lead.

phases.label: Levels 4-5
phases.why: Through levels 4-5 the numbers lean your way — bubble-sleep pick bursts edge out the wall-frost poke control when both sides play it straight. Press the small advantages: wave position, first poke, cooldown ticks.

phases.label: Level 6
phases.why: Portal Jump online — your Q angles multiply and gank dodges get disrespectful. The sniper has a slide.

phases.label: First item
phases.why: Luden's spike: sleep into max-range Q one-shots squishies. The lane is a dodgeball final now.

phases.label: Level 1
phases.why: Q-flick the last-hits — even short paddles chip, and the passive auto after each cast adds up fast.

phases.why: W watch begins: every summoner he spends becomes your loot — track the drops like a second income.

phases.label: Level 3
phases.why: E online: the bubble over the wall into max-range Q is the entire kill pattern, available from level 3.

phases.label: Levels 4-5
phases.why: Your bubble-sleep pick bursts out-muscle Aurelion Sol's stardust ramp control through levels 4-5 — this window is yours, so force the trades and tax every step toward the wave.

phases.label: Level 6
phases.why: At the level-6 breakpoint your bubble-sleep pick bursts beat the stardust ramp control in a straight exchange. Play the front foot — make Aurelion Sol answer you, not the other way around.
